description_long: This is a dark brown, weathered tricorn hat, reminiscent of those worn in the 18th century by sailors, pirates, and military officers. The hat features three sharply upturned brims, each forming a distinct point, creating a triangular silhouette when viewed from above. The surface appears to be made of aged leather, with visible creases, subtle textural variations, and a matte finish that suggests frequent use. Along the edges of the brims, there are small, evenly spaced metallic studs or rivets, adding both reinforcement and a decorative touch. The crown is rounded and slightly domed, sitting lower than the brims and blending smoothly into the upturned sides. There are no visible logos, ribbons, or other embellishments beyond the metallic studs.
description: A dark brown, weathered leather tricorn hat with upturned brims and metallic studs along the edges. The crown is rounded and the surface has a matte, aged finish.
description_view_0: The hat is seen from above, highlighting its triangular tricorn shape and the three sharply upturned brims with visible metallic studs.
description_view_1: A side view showing the pronounced upward curve of one brim and the rounded, domed crown blending into the brim.
description_view_2: A front-on view emphasizing the symmetrical upturned brims and the low, rounded crown at the center.
description_view_3: An angled view displaying the intersection of two brims and the smooth transition from the crown to the brim edges.
